facets.name: absorbs
data: game.html — mountDecalSystem (line 192), and the legacy _spawnParticles() bullet-impact calls scattered through mountBulletWorldHitTick (line 1843), mountEnemyBulletTick, mountShootSystem (line 1711). Substrate replaces them with one kind: a short-lived expanding-fading sphere spawned at the relevant point.

data.comment: Two variants today: muzzle (bright yellow flash at gun) and impact (orange/red puff at bullet endpoint). Future: blood, sparks, debris, dust, scorch — same kind, different tuning.
